# Knowledge Base RAG Module

Module ID: knowledge-base-rag
Status: draft
Purpose: Tenant-scoped knowledge base with articles, attachments, sources, ingestion jobs, semantic search, and cite-or-refuse grounded answers for support.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build

Use-cases:
- createArticle / updateArticle / listArticles / getArticle
- recordSource / listSources / attachArticleFile / listAttachments
- createWebScanJob / updateWebScanJob / listWebScanJobs
- createKnowledgeFeed / updateKnowledgeFeed / listKnowledgeFeeds
- searchKnowledge / answerQuestion
- draftSupportReply

Service facade:
- createKnowledgeBaseRagService(deps): raw/internal use-cases bound to shared deps.
- createKnowledgeBaseRagScopedService(ctx, deps): operator/request use-cases; tenant comes from AuthContext.

Grounding rule: answerQuestion and draftSupportReply must cite retrieved active articles or return 422. Support replies are draft-only.

Adapters:
- createExtractiveSynthesizer(): deterministic local/test answers.
- createGatewayAnswerSynthesizer(complete): ai-gateway bridge; caller injects a governed complete closure.
- createGatewayEmbeddingFn(embed): ai-gateway embedding bridge; caller injects a governed embed closure.
- createEmbeddingKnowledgeSearchIndex({ embed, vectorStore, store }): provider-neutral vector retrieval with tenant/status revalidation.
- createVectorizeStore(env.VECTORIZE): Cloudflare Vectorize VectorStore adapter; create metadata indexes for tenantId/projectId/status before inserting.
